mapper.sql: id , login_id , password , name , gender , birthday , delete_yn , created_date , modified_date , comment_noti_yn , reply_noti_yn
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_member WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND login_id = #{value}

SELECT
FROM tb_member WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND id = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_member SET delete_yn = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_member WHERE login_id = #{value}
